attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	HASH_MD5(DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY) AS DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY, INCIDENT_ID, INCIDENT_NUMBER, CASENUMBER, INCIDENT_STATUS_ID, INCIDENT_STATUS, CURRENT_SEVERITY, CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID, CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID, CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME, CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY, CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID, CURRENT_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY, CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER, ACTIVITY_NAME, ACTIVITY_DATE, CREATION_DATE,   INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID, ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO, RES_ROLE, DELIVERY_CHANNEL_TYPE, COMPLEXITY, CHG_CCO_ID, CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY, CHG_WG_SERVICE_TYPE, SR_TYPE, NOTE_TYPE,
HASH_MD5(PRE_DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY) AS DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY, CURRENT_WG_SERVICE_TYPE, ACTIVITY_CODE, HASH_MD5(DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY) AS RECORD_HASH,
CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ORDER BY DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY DESC) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END	AS DW_DELETE_FLAG   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ORDER BY DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY DESC) = 1

SELECT I.BL_INCIDENT_KEY  AS DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY
			,CAST(I.INCIDENT_ID AS BIGINT) AS INCIDENT_ID ,I.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,CAST(I.CASENUMBER AS BIGINT) AS CASENUMBER ,I.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID
			,I.INCIDENT_STATUS ,I.CURRENT_SEVERITY ,I.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID ,I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID ,I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME ,I.CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY
			,I.CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID ,COALESCE(CRNT_WG.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY, - 999) CURRENT_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY ,I.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER
			,I.ACTIVITY_CODE ,I.ACTIVITY_NAME ,I.ACTIVITY_DATE ,I.CREATION_DATE ,I.INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID ,I.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO ,CUR_R.RES_ROLE ,CRNT_WG.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_TYPE
			,I.COMPLEXITY ,COALESCE(CHG_R.CCO_ID, - 999) CHG_CCO_ID ,COALESCE(CHG_WG.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY, - 999) CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY 
			,CHG_WG.SERVICE_TYPE CHG_WG_SERVICE_TYPE ,I.SR_TYPE ,I.NOTE_TYPE 
			,LPAD(cast(COTTECH.TECH_ID as varchar(30)),10,'0' ) || LPAD( cast(COTTECH.SUB_TECH_ID as varchar(30)),10,'0' ) || COALESCE(I.PROBLEM_CODE, '_') PRE_DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY
			,CRNT_WG.SERVICE_TYPE CURRENT_WG_SERVICE_TYPE
FROM ( 	SELECT BASE_I.INCIDENT_ID ,BASE_I.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,BASE_I.CASENUMBER ,BASE_I.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,BASE_I.INCIDENT_STATUS ,BASE_I.CURRENT_SEVERITY 
						,BASE_I.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID ,BASE_I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID ,BASE_I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME ,BASE_I.CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY 
						,BASE_I.CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID 
						,CASE WHEN LENGTH(BASE_I.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER) > 2 THEN BASE_I.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER ELSE NULL END AS CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER
						,BASE_I.ACTIVITY_CODE ,BASE_I.ACTIVITY_NAME ,BASE_I.ACTIVITY_DATE ,BASE_I.CREATION_DATE ,BASE_I.INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID ,BASE_I.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO 
						,CASE  WHEN LENGTH(BASE_I.COMPLEXITY) > 2 THEN BASE_I.COMPLEXITY ELSE NULL END AS COMPLEXITY
						,BASE_I.CUR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,BASE_I.CHG_BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,BASE_I.NOTE_TYPE ,BASE_I.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY ,BASE_I.PROBLEM_CODE 
						,BASE_I.SR_TYPE ,BASE_I.BL_INCIDENT_KEY 
				FROM ( SELECT T.INCIDENT_ID,T.INCIDENT_NUMBER,T.CASENUMBER,T.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID,T.INCIDENT_STATUS, T.CURRENT_SEVERITY, T.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID
							,T.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID, T.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME, T.CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY, T.CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID, T.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER
							,T.ACTIVITY_CODE, T.ACTIVITY_NAME, T.ACTIVITY_DATE, T.CREATION_DATE, T.INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID, T.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO, T.COMPLEXITY
							,CUR_TRD.BL_RESOURCE_KEY CUR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY,CHG_TRD.BL_RESOURCE_KEY CHG_BL_RESOURCE_KEY, T.NOTE_TYPE, T.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY
							,T.PROBLEM_CODE,T.SR_TYPE,T.BL_INCIDENT_KEY
						FROM (	SELECT A.INCIDENT_ID ,A.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,CAST(A.CASENUMBER AS BIGINT) CASENUMBER ,A.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,A.INCIDENT_STATUS
										,A.CURRENT_SEVERITY, A.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID ,A.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID ,A.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME ,A.CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY
										,A.CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID ,A.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER, A.ACTIVITY_CODE, A.ACTIVITY_NAME, A.ACTIVITY_DATE, A.CREATION_DATE 
										,A.INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID ,A.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO , A.COMPLEXITY ,A.SR_TYPE ,A.NOTE_TYPE ,A.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
										,A.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY ,A.PROBLEM_CODE ,A.BL_INCIDENT_KEY 
								FROM (	SELECT T.INCIDENT_ID, T.INCIDENT_NUMBER,T.CASENUMBER, T.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID, T.INCIDENT_STATUS, T.CURRENT_SEVERITY
												,T.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID, T.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID, T.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME, T.CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY
												,T.CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID, T.CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER, T.ACTIVITY_CODE, T.ACTIVITY_NAME, T.ACTIVITY_DATE
												,T.CREATION_DATE, T.INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID, T.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO, T.COMPLEXITY,   T.NOTE_TYPE
												,T.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY
												,CASE WHEN LENGTH(T.PROBLEM_CODE) > 0 THEN T.PROBLEM_CODE ELSE NULL END PROBLEM_CODE
												,CASE WHEN T.B2B_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 'TAC-B2B' ELSE T.INCIDENT_TYPE END SR_TYPE, 
                                                CAST(T.BL_INCIDENT_KEY as varchar(30)) BL_INCIDENT_KEY, T.LAST_UPDATED_BY
										FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F T
										WHERE T.INCIDENT_TYPE_KEY IN (195, 196, 197, 198, 24126, 27065) 
										AND T.ACTIVITY_CODE IN (100,200,300, 600, 900, 1100,1700,1800,3500,2400,3400,4100,9200,10500,10600)
									) A
								INNER  JOIN ( SELECT INCIDENT_NUMBER 
											  FROM (	SELECT INCIDENT_NUMBER FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F 
														WHERE ACTIVITY_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) , -48) 
														GROUP BY 1 
 														UNION
														SELECT INCIDENT_NUMBER FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CRNT_F_WTCALC 
														WHERE CLOSED_DATE IS NULL
														GROUP BY 1 

) X  GROUP BY 1 
											) Y
								ON Y.INCIDENT_NUMBER = A.INCIDENT_NUMBER
						) T
						LEFT JOIN (SELECT BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,CCO_ID ,WORKGROUP_ID ,FND_USER_ID ,COALESCE(CAST(RL.BL_ATTRIBUTE1 AS INT), 10) AS RES_ROLE 
											,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE ,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE 
									FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
									LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D RL
									ON TRD.RESOURCE_ROLE_ID = RL.LOOKUP_ID
									AND RL.SOURCE_TABLE = 'TSI_FND_FLEX_VALUES') CUR_TRD
						ON T.CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID = CUR_TRD.CCO_ID 
						AND ACTIVITY_DATE >= CUR_TRD.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE 
						AND ACTIVITY_DATE < CUR_TRD.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE 
						LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_XXCTS_DM_FND_USR_MAP_WTCALC M
						ON T.LAST_UPDATED_BY = M.R11_USER_ID AND M.R11_USER_ID <> M.R12_USER_ID AND  M.R12_USER_ID IS NOT NULL
						LEFT JOIN (SELECT BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,CCO_ID ,WORKGROUP_ID ,FND_USER_ID ,COALESCE(CAST(RL.BL_ATTRIBUTE1 AS INT), 10) AS RES_ROLE 
											,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE ,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE 
									FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
									LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D RL
									ON TRD.RESOURCE_ROLE_ID = RL.LOOKUP_ID
									AND RL.SOURCE_TABLE = 'TSI_FND_FLEX_VALUES') CHG_TRD
						ON COALESCE(M.R12_USER_ID ,T.LAST_UPDATED_BY) = CHG_TRD.FND_USER_ID
						AND ACTIVITY_DATE >= CHG_TRD.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE 
						AND ACTIVITY_DATE < CHG_TRD.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
				)BASE_I 
				QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BL_INCIDENT_KEY ORDER BY CUR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC ,CHG_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC) = 1 
			) I
		LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,CCO_ID ,WORKGROUP_ID ,FND_USER_ID ,COALESCE(CAST(RL.BL_ATTRIBUTE1 AS INT), 10) AS RES_ROLE 
											,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE ,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE 
									FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
									LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D RL
									ON TRD.RESOURCE_ROLE_ID = RL.LOOKUP_ID
									AND RL.SOURCE_TABLE = 'TSI_FND_FLEX_VALUES') CUR_R 
		ON I.CUR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY = CUR_R.BL_RESOURCE_KEY
		LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BL_RESOURCE_KEY ,CCO_ID ,WORKGROUP_ID ,FND_USER_ID ,COALESCE(CAST(RL.BL_ATTRIBUTE1 AS INT), 10) AS RES_ROLE 
											,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE ,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE 
									FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
									LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D RL
									ON TRD.RESOURCE_ROLE_ID = RL.LOOKUP_ID
									AND RL.SOURCE_TABLE = 'TSI_FND_FLEX_VALUES') CHG_R 
		ON I.CHG_BL_RESOURCE_KEY = CHG_R.BL_RESOURCE_KEY
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WORKGROUP_D CRNT_WG 
		ON CRNT_WG.NATURAL_KEY = CASE WHEN I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID IN (- 777,- 888) THEN COALESCE(CUR_R.WORKGROUP_ID, - 999)
									WHEN I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID NOT IN (- 777,- 888) THEN - 777
									WHEN I.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID IS NULL THEN - 999
								  END
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WORKGROUP_D CHG_WG 
		ON CHG_WG.NATURAL_KEY = CASE WHEN CHG_R.FND_USER_ID IS NULL THEN - 999 ELSE CHG_R.WORKGROUP_ID END
		LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_COT_TECH_D_WTCALC COTTECH 
		ON I.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY = COTTECH.BL_COT_TECHNOLOGY_KEY
